name: Cash USA
description_short: Cash USA is a Baltimore pawn shop buying and selling gold, silver, electronics, and collectibles with 25+ years in business. They offer fast cash loans against collateral and competitive pricing on used goods.
description_long:
Cash USA has been operating as a pawn shop in Baltimore, Maryland since the early 1990s—over 25 years of service to the local community. Located at 1217 W North Ave, the shop functions as a traditional pawn operation where customers can sell items outright or use merchandise as collateral for fast cash loans.

The company buys and sells a broad range of merchandise including precious metals (gold and silver), consumer electronics, watches, video games, DVDs, audio equipment (speakers, mixers, DJ controllers, amplifiers), and high-definition televisions. They specifically note carrying only HDTVs manufactured from 2014 onward in sizes ranging from 19 inches to 60 inches or larger. Their inventory of DVDs and games is substantial, with pricing advertised at $3 per DVD. Audio equipment is presented as a specialty category with a full selection of professional and consumer gear.

Cash USA differentiates itself through staff longevity and personalized service. Paul Austin has been with the shop since its opening and is described as integral to customer relationships. Management emphasizes accurate pricing and customer satisfaction, with CEO Tony Abramov positioning hands-on involvement in operations. The company markets itself as offering competitive pricing and positioning deals as superior to competitors in the Baltimore area.

As a pawn shop, Cash USA provides immediate liquidity against collateral but operates within the constraints typical of the pawn industry—loans are secured by merchandise value, redemption periods are limited, and customers must retrieve items or lose them. The business model benefits those needing emergency cash but requires customers to part with personal property. Operating hours are Monday-Saturday 9 AM–6 PM, limiting accessibility for some consumers.
pros: 25+ years operating in Baltimore with established community presence
Paul Austin has been with the shop since opening—long-term staff continuity reduces turnover-related service inconsistency
Carries only HDTVs from 2014 and newer, suggesting quality control on electronics inventory
Wide product categories including audio equipment, precious metals, watches, and gaming—diverse collateral acceptance
Large DVD inventory at $3 per unit provides budget-friendly entertainment options
Same-day cash available against collateral—fast liquidity for emergency needs
CEO involvement in daily operations suggests accountability at ownership level
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering personal property—customers risk losing sentimental or valuable items if unable to repay
Limited operating hours (Mon-Sat, 9 AM–6 PM) exclude weekend and after-hours access
Website lacks critical loan terms: interest rates, loan duration, redemption periods, and default policies are not disclosed
No information on loan-to-value ratios, minimum/maximum loan amounts, or documentation requirements
Single location in Baltimore limits accessibility for Maryland residents outside West Baltimore area
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash against collateral (electronics, jewelry, gold/silver) without credit checks
Budget shoppers seeking discounted used goods, particularly DVDs, video games, and audio equipment
Local Baltimore residents with access to the W North Ave location during business hours
Individuals with items to sell outright (gold, silver, watches, electronics) for quick cash
diagnosis: Cash USA is best for Baltimore-area residents needing immediate short-term cash loans against personal collateral or seeking discounted used electronics and media. Critical caveat: the website omits essential loan terms (APR, duration, redemption deadline, default consequences), making it impossible to assess whether loans comply with Maryland pawn lending regulations or represent a reasonable financial option versus alternatives.
services: Pawn loans against collateral (fast cash secured by merchandise)
Audio equipment sales (speakers, mixers, DJ controllers, amplifiers, CD players)
